prompt: Create a one-page executive memo comparing three options for launching an AI assistant inside a regulated insurance company. Include benefits, risks, implementation complexity and recommendation.
Design an experiment to test whether personalised behavioural nudges improve weekly user engagement in a mental health app. Include hypothesis, metrics, sample design, risks and interpretation.
Turn this vague founder idea into a structured product brief: an AI tool that helps therapists understand client behaviour between sessions using sleep, activity and messaging signals.
